summary: Iteration 27 testing completed: All 26 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: Multi-select divisions/departments/races with comma-separated values, age_min/age_max range filters, combined demographic filters, per-chart export (POST /api/reports/export-chart), export-filtered with multi-select params, edge cases (empty strings, whitespace handling).

multiselect_divisions_single.result: PASS - Single division in comma-separated format works correctly

multiselect_divisions_multiple.result: PASS - Multiple comma-separated divisions filter correctly

multiselect_departments.result: PASS - Multiple comma-separated departments filter correctly

races_filter_available.result: PASS - 6 race options available in filters.races

multiselect_races.result: PASS - Multiple comma-separated races filter correctly

age_range_filter.result: PASS - Combined age range filter works

combined_all_demographic_filters.result: PASS - All demographic filters combined work correctly

edge_case_empty_string.result: PASS - Empty string returns all users (no filter applied)

edge_case_whitespace.result: PASS - Whitespace in comma-separated values handled correctly

export_filtered_multiselect.result: PASS - Export with multi-select divisions returns valid XLSX

export_filtered_with_races.result: PASS - Export with races filter returns valid XLSX

export_filtered_with_age_range.result: PASS - Export with age range returns valid XLSX

export_chart_success.result: PASS - Returns XLSX file with chart data

export_chart_empty_data_400.result: PASS - Returns 400 error with 'No data to export' message

reports_page_loads.result: PASS - Reports page loads with all components

multiselect_divisions_dropdown.result: PASS - 19 division options available, can select multiple

age_min_input.result: PASS - Input field present and functional

age_max_input.result: PASS - Input field present and functional

filter_badges.result: PASS - Filter badges appear with X to remove (e.g., 'Age >= 25', 'Age <= 45')

per_chart_export_buttons.result: PASS - 6 per-chart export buttons found (Download icon on each chart card)

chart_type_toggles.result: PASS - 36 chart type buttons found (6 types × 6 charts)

export_bar.result: PASS - Export bar with All Data, Users, Applications, Expenses, Tickets buttons

clear_all_filters.result: PASS - All filters cleared including age inputs

tab_navigation.result: PASS - Demographics, Applications, Expenses, Tickets tabs all work

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing data (387 users, 5 bursary apps, 1 training app, 7 tickets, R 10,300.00 expenses, 19 divisions, 6 races)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all multi-select demographic filtering features: 1) Multi-select divisions/departments/races work with comma-separated values sent to backend, 2) Backend correctly splits comma-separated strings into lists for MongoDB $in queries, 3) Age min/max range filters work correctly, 4) Combined demographic filters (divisions + races + age range) work together, 5) POST /api/reports/export-chart endpoint works for per-chart export, returns 400 for empty data, 6) GET /api/reports/export-filtered supports all multi-select params, 7) Frontend has MultiSelect component with Popover + Checkbox for multi-value selection, 8) Filter badges show active filters with X to remove, 9) Clear all filters resets all multi-select arrays and age inputs. Data context: 387 users, 19 divisions, 6 races available for filtering.
